videos.title: Highlights from Alutaguse Maraton 2026
videos.description:
Highlights from Alutaguse Maraton 2026

The Ski Classics Challengers event, Alutaguse Maraton, took place last Sunday with a 45km long-distance ski race in classic technique in Vasavere, Estonia. Watch the highlights here!

Video: Stuudiopunkt

videos.title: Alutaguse maraton
videos.description:
First win for the team!

“Hard to complain if you win," said Mart after the first victory in Alutaguse Marathon🥇. Good race from all the teammates. Warm-up is done - now we are ready to take on the challenge to win the 47. Tartu Maraton 😎
